languages.text: "Ты упомянул анкер-ядро. Это еще что такое?"

traits.locale_text: "Анкер-ядро? Это еще что такое? Как оно выглядит"

languages.text: "You mentioned an anchor-core. What in the Throne is that?"
languages.original_text: "Ты упомянул анкер-ядро. Это еще что такое?"

traits.locale_text: "You mentioned an anchor-core. What in the Throne is that?"
"You mentioned an anchor-core. What in the Throne is that?"
"You mentioned an anchor-core. What in the Throne is that?"

languages.text: 「アンカーコアについて言及していましたが、それは何？」
languages.original_text: "You mentioned an anchor-core. What in the Throne is that?"

traits.locale_text: 「アンカーコアについて言及していましたが、それは何ですか？」

languages.text: "Çapa çekirdeğinden bahsettin. Taht adına... O da ne?"
languages.original_text: "You mentioned an anchor-core. What in the Throne is that?"

traits.locale_text: "Çapa çekirdeğinden bahsettin. Taht adına... O da ne?"

languages.text: «Ha mencionado un núcleo de anclaje. ¿Qué diantres es eso?».
languages.original_text: "You mentioned an anchor-core. What in the Throne is that?"

traits.locale_text: «Ha mencionado un núcleo de anclaje. ¿Qué diantres es eso?».

languages.text: “黄金王座在上，你刚才提到的锚核到底是什么？”
languages.original_text: "You mentioned an anchor-core. What in the Throne is that?"

traits.locale_text: “黄金王座在上，你刚才提到的锚核到底是什么？”

languages.text: « Vous avez évoqué un noyau ancestral. De quoi s'agit-il exactement, au nom du Trône ? »
languages.original_text: "You mentioned an anchor-core. What in the Throne is that?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez évoqué un noyau ancestral. De quoi s'agit-il exactement, au nom du Trône ? »

languages.text: "Ihr habt einen Ankerkern erwähnt. Was beim Thron soll das sein?"
languages.original_text: "You mentioned an anchor-core. What in the Throne is that?"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt einen Ankerkern erwähnt. Was beim Thron soll das sein?"
